title: DisableWindCharge
description: Simple LightWeight plugin to disable wind charge on your server.
body:
**DISABLEWINDCHARGE**
- ✅ lightweight
- ✅ configurable

Config.yml:

```
# -----------------------
# DisableWindCharge config file
# author: aphonix
# discord: https://discord.gg/zYVtWxEar8
# -----------------------

DisableWindChargeMessage: "&b&l[DWC] &7WindCharge is disabled on this server."




```
